message:
chore: update infrastructure and legacy support files

- sw.js: Update cache version and implement dynamic base path handling for flexible deployment.
- examples/tests/node-smoke.test.mjs: Update test to correctly load WASM bytes for Node.js environment.
- examples/tailwind.css: Commit build artifacts for latest styles.
- examples/viz-benchmarks-classic.html: Add Three.js importmap for compatibility.
- examples/viz-benchmarks-working.html: Backup/reference update.
